{% endif %}

{{ vendor_form.phone.errors.0 }}
{% endif %}

{{ vendor_form.contact_person.errors.0 }}
{% endif %}

{{ vendor_form.designation }} {% if vendor_form.designation.errors %}
{{ vendor_form.designation.errors.0 }}
{% endif %}

{{ vendor_form.gstin_number }} {% if vendor_form.gstin_number.errors %}
{{ vendor_form.gstin_number.errors.0 }}
{% endif %}
{# Address Line 1 #}
{{ address_form.address_line_one }} {% if address_form.address_line_one.errors %}
{{ address_form.address_line_one.errors.0 }}
{% endif %}
{# Address Line 2 #}
{{ address_form.address_line_two }} {% if address_form.address_line_two.errors %}
{{ address_form.address_line_two.errors.0 }}
{% endif %}
{# Country #}
{{ address_form.country }} {% if address_form.country.errors %}
{{ address_form.country.errors.0 }}
{% endif %}
{# State #}
{{ address_form.state }} {% if address_form.state.errors %}
{{ address_form.state.errors.0 }}
{% endif %}
{# City #}
{{ address_form.city }} {% if address_form.city.errors %}
{{ address_form.city.errors.0 }}
{% endif %}
{# Zip Code #}
{{ address_form.pin_code }} {% if address_form.pin_code.errors %}
{{ address_form.pin_code.errors.0 }}
{% endif %}

{{ vendor_form.description }} {% if vendor_form.description.errors %}
{{ vendor_form.description.errors.0 }}
{% endif %}
